name: Grandma Riel's Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 medium Granny Smith apples (I use 10), peeled and sliced
1/4 cup butter - up to 3/4 of a stick
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Prepare the bottom crust and settle into a 9-inch pie plate.
Peel and slice apples. Mix together 1/2 cup of flour and 1/2 cup of granulated sugar; pour evenly into the bottom pie crust. Arrange apples to form a nice heap. Sprinkle with the second 1/2 cup sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Cut butter into chunks and place on top of apples, spacing evenly. Top with the second pie crust and seal the edges. Brush the top of the pie crust with an egg white and water mixture; sprinkle with sugar.
Bake at 400 degrees F for 50 minutes.
